# init(identifier:remotePid:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ BrowserEngineKit ](/documentation/browserenginekit)

- [ BEAccessibilityRemoteHostElement ](/documentation/browserenginekit/beaccessibilityremotehostelement)

- [ init(identifier:remotePid:) ](/documentation/browserenginekit/beaccessibilityremotehostelement/init(identifier:remotepid:))

- [ BEAccessibilityRemoteHostElement ](/documentation/browserenginekit/beaccessibilityremotehostelement)

-  init(identifier:remotePid:) 

Initializer# init(identifier:remotePid:)

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+

```
init(
    identifier: String,
    remotePid: pid_t
)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/browserenginekit/beaccessibilityremotehostelement/init(identifier:remotepid:)#parameters)

`identifier`Unique identifier to connect this remote element to the remote element it hosts. This should be unique per pair of remote elements.

`remotePid`The PID of the hosted remote element’s process.

## [Discussion](/documentation/browserenginekit/beaccessibilityremotehostelement/init(identifier:remotepid:)#discussion)

Initializes a remote element in the hosting process.
